g.text: A Markdown editor that puts typography first.
Warm charcoal surfaces, indigo accent, parchment text
Cream surfaces, deeper indigo, warm near-black text
Inter for UI. JetBrains Mono for code. Em-based heading scale.
Good tools recede; they make the page feel like
paper and the keyboard feel like ink. Inline
The best words in the best order. — Coleridge
Buttons, menu items, tabs, code blocks, kbd
Full window — titlebar, tabs, sidebar, editor, statusbar
A short reader to stress-test the typographic system —
headings, inline marks, code, quotes, and the spaces between.
"The best words in the best order." — Coleridge
